examples: No longer helpless, never upset, and beatific forever.
It is known that strong body is a foundation of beatific life.
When Iris appears, apparently beatific but with frustrations of her own, the stage is set.
His beatific, unfocussed expression abruptly changed when he noticed me sitting on the floor.
Senior Tories are beguiled by May 1st 1997, the day of Mr Blair's beatific entry into power.
